title: Under 5 minutes to a deployed LLM endpoint — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: RunPod is a serverless GPU platform enabling LLM deployment in under five minutes via a Hub interface. The platform reaches $120 million ARR with 500,000 developers and offers pay-per-request pricing on H100 hardware.
